title: Extra Select Mealworm High Energy Suet Pellets Wild Bird Food - Protein, Fat Rich Year-Round Feeding - 3 kg Refill (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Mealworm Flavour: Infused with dried mealworms, a favourite among garden birds. Exceptionally high Protein (10.6%) and Fat (22%).
High Energy: Specially formulated to be rich in protein and fats, perfect as winter bird food.
All-Season Feeding: Suitable for year-round use, providing consistent wild bird food nourishment.
Human-Grade Beef Suet: Utilizes high-quality, human-grade beef suet for superior bird suet pellets.
Three Flavours: Berry, Insect, and Mealworm options to cater to varied bird preferences, enriching your garden bird food selection.
description: Indications Crude Protein 6.2% - Crude Fibres 2.0% - Crude Fats and Oils 22.5% - Crude Ash 0.7% - Moisture 11.3% Ingredients Wheat flour, Beef fat (21%), Wheat starch, Peanut flour, Mealworm 0.01% Directions Feed using a suitable feeder or place on bird table/other flat surface at a safe height, away from predators. Store in a cool, dry & dark place. See more
